content.text: actualizate a la ultima version de qwenpaw: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/QwenPaw/releases/tag/v1.1.7

content.thinking: Tony wants me to update to the latest version of QwenPaw. Let me first check the current version, then install the new one from GitHub.

content.text: Verifico la versión actual y luego instalo la nueva:

content.name: execute_shell_command

input.command: pip show qwenpaw 2>/dev/null | grep -E "Version|Name" || echo "No instalado localmente" && echo "" && echo "Última release en GitHub:" && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/agentscope-ai/QwenPaw/releases/tags/v1.1.7" | python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load(sys.stdin); print('Tag:', r.get('tag_name')); print('Nombre:', r.get('name')); print('Fecha:', r.get('published_at')); print('Assets:', [a['name'] for a in r.get('assets',[])])" 2>/dev/null || echo "API rate limited — verificando via releases page..."

content.raw_input: {"command":"pip show qwenpaw 2>/dev/null | grep -E \"Version|Name\" || echo \"No instalado localmente\" && echo \"\" && echo \"Última release en GitHub:\" && curl -s \"https://api.github.com/repos/agentscope-ai/QwenPaw/releases/tags/v1.1.7\" | python3 -c \"import sys,json; r=json.load(sys.stdin); print('Tag:', r.get('tag_name')); print('Nombre:', r.get('name')); print('Fecha:', r.get('published_at')); print('Assets:', [a['name'] for a in r.get('assets',[])])\" 2>/dev/null || echo \"API rate limited — verificando via releases page...\""}

output.text:
No instalado localmente

Última release en GitHub:

Nombre: v1.1.7
Fecha: 2026-05-14T05:40:57Z
Assets: ['QwenPaw-1.1.7-macOS.zip', 'QwenPaw-Setup-1.1.7.exe']

content.thinking:
The release v1.1.7 has two assets: a macOS zip and a Windows installer. No Linux release. This is a desktop application (QwenPaw), not a Python package on PyPI.

Let me check if there's a pip package or a different way to install it.

content.text: Los assets son macOS y Windows. Busco si hay paquete pip o alternativa Linux:

content.name: execute_shell_command

input.command:
echo "=== Todos los releases recientes ===" && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/agentscope-ai/QwenPaw/releases" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
releases = json.load(sys.stdin)
for r in releases[:5]:
    assets = [a['name'] for a in r.get('assets',[])]
    print(f\"{r['tag_name']} — {r['published_at'][:10]} — {assets}\")
" && echo "" && echo "=== Paquetes pip ===" && pip search qwenpaw 2>/dev/null || pip index versions qwenpaw 2>/dev/null || echo "No disponible en PyPI" && echo "" && echo "=== Página del repo ===" && curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/agentscope-ai/QwenPaw/v1.1.7/README.md" 2>/dev/null | head -40

content.raw_input:
{"command":"echo "=== Todos los releases recientes ===" && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/agentscope-ai/QwenPaw/releases" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
releases = json.load(sys.stdin)
for r in releases[:5]:
    assets = [a['name'] for a in r.get('assets',[])]
    print(f\"{r['tag_name']} — {r['published_at'][:10]} — {assets}\")
" && echo "" && echo "=== Paquetes pip ===" && pip search qwenpaw 2>/dev/null || pip index versions qwenpaw 2>/dev/null || echo "No disponible en PyPI" && echo "" && echo "=== Página del repo ===" && curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/agentscope-ai/QwenPaw/v1.1.7/README.md" 2>/dev/null | head -40"}
